title: Udon Prison Breaks Under Luffy’s Will
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Queen, Unknown person #10, Big Mom, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
scene: Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She found it, but you've also found your way into deep water!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huuuuh?! did I just say that out loud?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought that was in my head! The "oshiruko was yummy" thing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You just said it again! Are you crazy?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we fall out of this ring, we're going to die! For real!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: blades will come out of this collar and cut our heads off!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And who the hell are you, Oshiruko eater?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, yeah! I'm disguised as a Samurai right now! That's why you don't know who I am!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This is bad! This is really bad!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is bad. One more push and it's lights out.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't take even a single step back from here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big mom! Just kill those two and be done with it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The poor people in that tiny village... they were so nice to me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So I wanted to bring them back a bunch of Oshiruko!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: O-Lin! That looks so nice on you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I wanted them to have some too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Why did you eat it, boy?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is it, I guess. There's no saving me now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it! I won't let you die! And I'm _ not dyin' either!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon Liberation storyline with 45 dialogue beats. Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
